name: me.omegacentauri/tools
title: Omega Centauri Society — Astrophysics Calculator Suite
description: Interactive, client-side astrophysics decision tools — IMBH evidence, black-hole physics, Fermi paradox, SETI sensitivity, Macro Transcension Hypothesis, Kardashev metrics. Emits ChainGraph hash-anchored artifacts with reproducible execution_hash. Zero PII.
